title: lobelia kohautiana
intro: Lobelia kohautiana, also known as New Zealand Lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe irritated tissues. The health benefits of Lobelia kohautiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and colds, and even exhibit antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Lobelia kohautiana can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
